21.dv: or קֹשְׁטְ; from an unused root meaning to balance;

21.kj: answer, [idiom] appointed unto him, saying, speech, word.

22.dv: from H6031 (עָנָה); (practically the same as H6035 (עָנָו), although the margin constantly disputes this, making H6035 (עָנָו) subjective and objectiv

22.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
22.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

22.gl: to crumble; transitively, to bruise (literally or figuratively)
22.kj: beat to pieces, break (in pieces), bruise, contrite, crush, destroy, humble, oppress, smite.

22.gl: to pluck off; specifically to flay, strip or rob
22.kj: catch, consume, exercise (robbery), pluck (off), rob, spoil, take away (by force, violence), tear.

22.gl: an opening, i.e. door or gate
22.dv: from H8176 (שָׁעַר) in its original sense;

22.gl: properly, dangling, i.e. (by implication) weak or thin

23.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
23.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

23.gl: properly, to toss, i.e. grapple; mostly figuratively, to wrangle, i.e. hold a controversy; (by implication) to defend
23.kj: adversary, chide, complain, contend, debate, [idiom] ever, [idiom] lay wait, plead, rebuke, strive, [idiom] thoroughly.
[phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.

23.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
23.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

24.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
24.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

24.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
24.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
24.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

24.gl: a master; hence, a husband, or (figuratively) owner (often used with another noun in modifications of this latter sense)
24.kj: [phrase] archer, [phrase] babbler, [phrase] bird, captain, chief man, [phrase] confederate, [phrase] have to do, [phrase] dreamer, those to whom it is due, [phrase] furious, those

24.gl: to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend)
24.kj: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house

24.gl: properly, the nose or nostril; hence, the face, and occasionally a person; also (from the rapid breathing in passion) ire
24.kj: anger(-gry), [phrase] before, countenance, face, [phrase] forebearing, forehead, [phrase] (long-) suffering, nose, nostril, snout, [idiom] worthy, wrath.

24.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
24.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

25.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
25.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

25.gl: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
25.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

25.gl: a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively); by implication, a hook (for the nose)
a well-trodden road (literally or figuratively); also a caravan
25.kj: manner, path, race, rank, traveller, troop, (by-, high-) way.

25.gl: properly, removal; used only (in the construction) adverb as conjunction, lest
hence, to learn (and causatively to teach)
25.dv: a primitive root, to associate with;

26.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
26.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

26.gl: to clatter, i.e. slap (the hands together), clang (an instrument); by analogy, to drive (a nail or tent-pin, a dart, etc.); by implication, to become bondsman by handclasping)
26.kj: blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, [idiom] suretiship, thrust.

26.gl: the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power
26.kj: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

26.gl: to braid, i.e. intermix; technically, to traffic (as if by barter); also or give to be security (as a kind of exchange)
26.kj: engage, (inter-) meddle (with), mingle (self), mortgage, occupy, give pledges, be(-come, put in) surety, undertake.

26.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
26.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

27.gl: to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications)
27.kj: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, re

27.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
27.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
27.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

27.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
27.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
27.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

27.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
27.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

27.gl: to take (in the widest variety of applications)
27.kj: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

27.gl: a bed (figuratively, a bier); abstractly, sleep; by euphemism, carnal intercourse

28.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application
28.kj: accomplish, advance, appoint, apt, be at, become, bear, bestow, bring forth, bruise, be busy, [idiom] certainly, have the charge of, commit, deal (with), deck, [phrase] displease,

28.kj: border, bound, coast, [idiom] great, landmark, limit, quarter, space.

28.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
28.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.

28.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
28.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.
departing away, remove, take (hold), turn away.

29.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
29.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
29.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

29.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
29.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
29.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

29.gl: properly, deputyship, i.e. ministry; generally, employment (never servile) or work (abstractly or concretely); also property (as the result of labor)
29.kj: business, [phrase] cattle, [phrase] industrious, occupation, ([phrase] -pied), [phrase] officer, thing (made), use, (manner of) work((-man), -manship).

29.gl: to place (any thing so as to stay); reflexively, to station, offer, continue
29.kj: present selves, remaining, resort, set (selves), (be able to, can, with-) stand (fast, forth, -ing, still, up).

29.gl: properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
29.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

29.gl: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of
